h14a6b769gf733g48f3gae64g2387d90d7e1f: It won't be easy in Baldur's Gate, but I hope it'll be better than here, at least.
h6536926dge68bg4075gb0f3g6d7e88e7152d: Elturel didn't want us, and those druids sure as hells didn't either, but you... you risked your life for us.
h4ee0c3bdg6073g40b1g9a57g751d41f7c996: Please. Have you seen Doni anywhere? Young boy, doesn't talk?
h00877f94g9d24g427egab94gdac9d13319fd: We need to get him into the cave before the goblins come.
hcb63d431g31eag43bcg81dcge83e91fdfa7f: No - but I'll keep an eye out for him.
h17ee5819g4976g44e1gbaffgfafdaaad2541: I appreciate it. He's the one who showed us the cave to begin with.
h18c2fb90g06a8g4b6eg95f8g1309cb5a874c: We won't seal it up until he's safe with the rest.
hd2c66e84g1832g44acg8395g3211d313a066: The kids found a hidden cave. We're going to hide them there.
h045fe352g0323g4351g8135g59ef1c2e1c69: But we can't seal it up until we find Doni.
hb388f815gbd94g449ag821ege9158a1299e5: There's a battle coming - I have slightly more pressing concerns.
h1f11c778g8f93g472eg9b35g3329dd77e350: Then stop wasting my time. I have a child to find.
h05d3e6e2gffc0g4cd4ga1aagbd8fe2f7404e: Hmm. Perhaps he slipped into a pocket plane - happened to an uncle of mine.
h6f09aab9gead4g479fgb7abg10405572b1e9: I don't have time for this. We can't seal up without him.
h730e1348g4a49g4a83g88d1g9f3168c0c34f: Go to the barricades. I can hold this place, if a few goblins slip through.
h137f6702gd4a2g4e1dgaf06gdb5f3b6b01ad: Thanks for finding Doni. Knowing the children are safe makes all this a little easier.
